steps.title: Find the main verb
steps.content: The subject of the main clause is President Mikhail Gorbachev's reforms. The by helping phrase is an interrupting modifier, so the blank must supply a finite main verb for what the reforms did.

steps.title: Avoid fragment forms
steps.content: Choices B and C are nonfinite participial forms, so they cannot serve as the main verb. Choice D turns the idea into a relative clause and still leaves no main verb. The answer is A.
